notes:
Works perfectly out of the box.

The one thing I changed was switching to fullscreen (instead of borderless window) in the graphics settings. In borderless, I was getting 40-45fps and in fullscreen I get locked 60fps for 1440p@Max.
title: DRAGON QUEST® XI: Echoes of an Elusive Age™ - Digital Edition of Light

notes: I'm using the NVIDIA PRIME implementation for Optimus graphics on my laptop.  I had noticed a lot of screen tearing until I found a module option for nvidia-drm for modesetting;  That synced the Intel and NVIDIA cards together and eliminated the screen tearing, but then I would experience ugly hangs for a few seconds at a time while playing.  Apparently this is due to a conflict with how NVIDIA (/PRIME) handles Vsync, and I had to disable VSYNC inside DQXI's video settings.  Now it runs perfectly!
title: DRAGON QUEST® XI: Echoes of an Elusive Age™ - Digital Edition of Light
